text: Entering the dim hallway, I feel a mix of curiosity and mild apprehension. The emptiness and cool artificial light evoke a sense of detachment, as if I am transitioning from the familiar into a space ripe for intellectual discovery. Upon arriving at the R+D wall, surrounded by words about intelligent machines and human connection, my curiosity turns into excitement. I sense the presence of innovation, yet I am reminded how human understanding remains forever entangled with our creations. Here, I am both observer and participant, pondering my own role in this unfolding dialogue between humanity and technology.
